_comment: Trigger fixtures for eval_triggers.py. Each case is a representative user message and the skill that SHOULD auto-fire (or NONE). 'expect' must equal a skill dir name, or 'NONE'. The first block is one clean case per skill; the second block ('-- disambiguation --') stress-tests skills whose descriptions overlap (cc-tune vs doc-illustrate, explain-article vs cc-tune = 理解 vs 取り込み診断, explain-article vs ざっと要約 = NONE, ship vs create-pr, doc-review over-firing on light reviews). Add cases as you discover real mis-fires from the usage dashboard (P3). The last block ('-- adversarial 2026-07-10 --') is the Fable-window sweep: paraphrases that must still fire (チケット切って→create-issue, プルリク→ship) and near-miss negatives that must NOT (コミットだけ, PR の説明, 別の観点, issue 要約, AWS 実装コード). Codex review queries expect NONE since 2026-07-11: the codex-secondopinion skill was retired for the openai codex plugin, whose /codex:review is user-invoked only (Claude just points to the command).
